exports.content: Perovskite solar cells can achieve commercially competitive power conversion efficiency exceeding 20%
exports.label: p_efficiency

exports.content: Perovskite solar cell efficiency can be continuously improved through materials engineering, interface engineering, and compositional engineering
exports.label: p_improvement

exports.content: Perovskite solar cells can be scaled to module/panel level and industrially manufactured via roll-to-roll or slot-die processes
exports.label: p_industrialization

exports.content: Perovskite solar cells can achieve operational stability sufficient for practical deployment (>1000 hours under standard test conditions)
exports.label: p_stability

exports.content: Organometal halide perovskites can function as viable photovoltaic absorbers
exports.label: p_viability
